items.d: You write to a child at this, for example noah11@zpin.com.
items.s: What is your email ___? Can you spell it, please?
items.hintDe: Dorthin schickst du jemandem eine E-Mail.

items.d: A flat thing on the wall. The teacher writes on it, and then you clean it.
items.s: Don't write on your desk! Write on the ___.
items.hintDe: Vorne an der Wand; die Lehrerin schreibt darauf und wischt es dann sauber.

items.d: You read it. It has many pages and pictures.
items.s: I am reading a funny story ___ with many pictures.
items.hintDe: Das liest du; es hat viele Seiten.

items.d: You sit down on it at your desk.
items.s: Sit down on your ___, please.
items.hintDe: Darauf setzt du dich.

items.d: A young boy or girl. There are 20 of them in our class.
items.s: This ___ in our class is Mike. He is ten.
items.hintDe: Ein junger Bub oder ein junges Mädchen.

items.d: All the children who learn together with one teacher.
items.s: There are 20 children in our ___. We learn English here.
items.hintDe: Alle Kinder, die mit einer Lehrkraft zusammen lernen.

items.d: You sit down at it in class to read and write. Your books are on it.
items.s: My books and pens are on my ___.
items.hintDe: Daran sitzt du und legst deine Bücher darauf.

items.d: You open it to go into a room. You close it after you.
items.s: Please close the ___ and sit down.
items.hintDe: Du machst sie auf und gehst in den Raum.

items.d: A thin thing with empty pages. You write your homework in it.
items.s: Write the numbers in your ___ with a pen.
items.hintDe: Ein dünnes Heft, in das du deine Hausaufgaben schreibst.

items.d: The one thing you love the best of all.
items.s: Green is my ___ colour. I love it the best.
items.hintDe: Das, was du am allerliebsten magst.

items.d: A girl can wear it in her hair, over her head.
items.s: Leah has a pink ___ in her hair.
items.hintDe: Das trägt ein Mädchen im Haar.

items.d: You wear it on your head.
items.s: He has a warm ___ on his head in winter.
items.hintDe: Das trägst du auf dem Kopf.

items.d: In this place, not over there.
items.s: ___ is your pencil case. It was on my desk.
items.hintDe: An diesem Ort, nicht dort drüben.

items.d: You say it to a child. You ask the child if all is good.
items.s: Hi, Dave! ___ — I'm fine, thanks.
items.hintDe: So fragst du jemanden, wie es ihm geht.

items.d: You ask it about a number of books, pens or animals.
items.s: ___ frogs can you see in the picture?
items.hintDe: So fragst du nach einer Anzahl.

items.d: You say it when a child asks how you are and all is good.
items.s: How are you? — ___, thanks. And you?
items.hintDe: So sagst du, dass es dir gut geht.

items.d: A word for a thing or an animal, not for a child.
items.s: I have a pet frog. ___ is green.
items.hintDe: Das Wort für ein Ding oder ein Tier.

items.d: You say it when you want to do a thing with a child.
items.s: ___ sing a song! It is so much fun.
items.hintDe: So schlägst du vor, etwas zusammen zu tun.

items.d: Not dark. A pale colour, for example the sky on a sunny morning.
items.s: My favourite colour is ___ blue, like the sky.
items.hintDe: Nicht dunkel, eine blasse Farbe.

items.d: 12 o'clock at night, when all the class is in bed.
items.s: It's 12 o'clock now — it's ___ in the classroom.
items.hintDe: Zwölf Uhr in der Nacht.

items.d: A bigger number of a thing than now.
items.s: Can I have ___ water, please? My glass is empty.
items.hintDe: Eine größere Menge als jetzt.

items.d: When you have to do a thing. You can not say no to it.
items.s: It's late. I ___ go home now.
items.hintDe: Du hast keine Wahl, du tust es.

items.d: A word for one thing and not the other. You take one of two.
items.s: Do you want a pen ___ a pencil? Take one.
items.hintDe: Du nimmst eins von zweien.

items.d: Of you and me. It is not theirs.
items.s: This is ___ classroom. All of us in this class learn here.
items.hintDe: Es gehört dir und mir zusammen.

items.d: You write with it. It is blue, red or black, and you can not clean it with a rubber.
items.s: Can I write my name with your blue ___?
items.hintDe: Damit schreibst du; weg radieren kannst du es nicht.

items.d: You write or draw with it, and then you can clean it with a rubber.
items.s: I write with my grey ___, and I can clean it with a rubber.
items.hintDe: Damit schreibst oder zeichnest du; mit dem Radiergummi geht es weg.

items.d: A little bag. Your pen and ruler are in it.
items.s: Take your pencil and rubber out of your ___.
items.hintDe: Die kleine Tasche für Stift, Bleistift und Lineal.

items.d: You draw or paint it. You can also look at it in a book.
items.s: Look at the ___ on the wall. Can you see the colours?
items.hintDe: Das zeichnest oder malst du.

items.d: A machine that shows a picture or a film on the wall.
items.s: Our teacher turns on the ___ and we look at the film on the wall.
items.hintDe: Damit kommt ein großes Bild oder ein Film an die Wand.

items.d: You use it to clean a pencil mark from the page.
items.s: I write a wrong word, so I use my ___ to clean the page.
items.hintDe: Damit machst du einen Bleistiftstrich wieder weg.

items.d: It is flat. You use it to draw a line that is not bent.
items.s: Use a ___ to draw a straight line.
items.hintDe: Damit ziehst du eine gerade Linie.

items.d: You put all your books and pens in it. You take it to class.
items.s: Take your exercise book out of your ___.
items.hintDe: Darin sind alle deine Bücher und Stifte für die Schule.

items.d: You wear it around your neck with a shirt.
items.s: Can you find Leah's ___? It is on her white shirt.
items.hintDe: Das trägst du um den Hals zum Schulhemd.

items.d: You find it in your pencil case. You cut paper with it.
items.s: I need my ___ to cut out this picture.
items.hintDe: Damit schneidest du Papier.

items.d: You wear it on the top of your body. It has buttons.
items.s: He has a clean white ___ on for school.
items.hintDe: Das trägst du oben am Körper; es hat Knöpfe.

items.d: You wear it on one foot, over your sock.
items.s: I can find one ___, but where is the other one?
items.hintDe: Den trägst du an einem Fuß, über der Socke.

items.d: A girl can wear it. It is not trousers.
items.s: She has a red ___ on today.
items.hintDe: Das trägt oft ein Mädchen; es ist keine Hose.

items.d: You wear them on your feet, in your shoes.
items.s: I put on my clean ___ and then my shoes.
items.hintDe: Die trägst du an den Füßen, in den Schuhen.

items.d: A machine in the classroom. It plays music for all the class.
items.s: Our teacher plays a song on the ___ and we all listen.
items.hintDe: Daraus kommt die Musik für die ganze Klasse.

items.d: Dark glasses. You wear them on your eyes when the sun is bright.
items.s: It is very sunny, so I wear my dark ___.
items.hintDe: Eine dunkle Brille für sonnige Tage.

items.d: A warm top with sleeves. You wear it over your shirt when it is cold.
items.s: It is cold today, so wear a warm ___ over your shirt.
items.hintDe: Ein warmes Oberteil mit langen Ärmeln über dem Hemd.

items.d: A flat thing with a glass screen. A child can read or play games on it.
items.s: Switch on your ___ and look at the picture on the screen.
items.hintDe: Ein kleiner, flacher Computer mit Bildschirm.

items.d: Of them. The book is of the children, so it is the book of them.
items.s: The children put ___ school bags on the floor.
items.hintDe: Es gehört ihnen (mehreren).

items.d: After the first thing.
items.s: Listen to the dialogue. ___ read it.
items.hintDe: Danach, als Nächstes.

items.d: What a clock shows you. It can be one o'clock or two o'clock.
items.s: What ___ is it now? It's midnight.
items.hintDe: Das zeigt dir die Uhr.

items.d: To put a question to a child or to your teacher.
items.s: Can I ___ you a question?
items.hintDe: Du stellst jemandem eine Frage.

items.d: To take the dirt from a thing so it is not dirty.
items.s: Please ___ the board after the class.
items.hintDe: Den Schmutz wegmachen, sodass etwas wieder sauber ist.

items.d: To shut a door or a window so it is not open.
items.s: It is cold in here. Please ___ the window.
items.hintDe: Eine Tür oder ein Fenster zumachen.

items.d: To put food into your mouth.
items.s: I'm a frog and I ___ insects.
items.hintDe: Du tust Essen in den Mund.

items.d: To like a thing very, very much when you do it.
items.s: ___ the music! It is a very cool song.
items.hintDe: Etwas mit viel Freude tun.

items.d: To see a thing you were looking for.
items.s: Can you ___ my school tie? It is on my chair.
items.hintDe: Du siehst etwas, das du gesucht hast.

items.d: To put a thing into the hand of a child or your teacher.
items.s: ___ me your school bag, please.
items.hintDe: Du legst jemandem etwas in die Hand.

items.d: To walk from one place to the next place.
items.s: It is late. I must ___ home now. Bye!
items.hintDe: Von einem Ort zum nächsten gehen.

items.d: To not like a thing at all. It is the other way from love.
items.s: I ___ pink. It is not for me at all!
items.hintDe: Etwas überhaupt nicht mögen.

items.d: To use your ears for a song or for music.
items.s: ___ to the song, then read the text.
items.hintDe: Du nimmst die Ohren, um ein Lied zu hören.

items.d: To use your eyes to see a thing.
items.s: ___ at the picture on the board!
items.hintDe: Du nimmst die Augen, um etwas zu sehen.

items.d: To like a child, an animal or a thing very, very much.
items.s: I ___ blue. It's my favourite colour.
items.hintDe: Etwas oder jemanden ganz, ganz doll mögen.

items.d: To see a child for the first time and say hello.
items.s: Nice to ___ you! My name is Sue.
items.hintDe: Jemanden zum ersten Mal sehen und Hallo sagen.

items.d: To make a door, a window or a book not closed.
items.s: ___ your books and read page ten.
items.hintDe: Eine Tür, ein Fenster oder ein Buch aufmachen.

items.d: To look at words on a page and understand them.
items.s: I like to ___ a story book before I go to bed.
items.hintDe: Du schaust Wörter auf einer Seite an und verstehst sie.

items.d: To put your body down on a chair.
items.s: Please ___ on your chair, children.
items.hintDe: Du bringst deinen Körper auf den Stuhl.

items.d: To use your mouth to say words to a child.
items.s: Don't ___ during the test. Listen and write.
items.hintDe: Du nimmst den Mund, um Wörter zu sagen.

items.d: To get up from your chair and be on your feet.
items.s: Don't ___. Sit down, please.
items.hintDe: Vom Stuhl hoch auf die Füße kommen.

items.d: To get a thing from inside your school bag.
items.s: ___ your books and put them on your desks.
items.hintDe: Etwas aus der Schultasche holen.

items.d: To look at a word and find out what it means.
items.s: I don't ___ this word. What is it in German?
items.hintDe: Du weißt, was ein Wort bedeutet.

items.d: To make words and numbers on a page with a pen.
items.s: ___ the numbers in your exercise book.
items.hintDe: Du machst Wörter und Zahlen mit einem Stift aufs Papier.

items.d: You open it in the wall. You can look out and see the school garden.
items.s: It is hot in here. Please open the ___.
items.hintDe: Du machst es auf, dann kommt frische Luft herein.

items.d: Of you. It is not mine.
items.s: Is this ___ pen? It was on your desk.
items.hintDe: Es gehört dir.
